task.title: Explain retry handling
task.user_request: Help me understand how this service retries failed requests without changing code.
task.summary: Read-only explanation of retry behavior for a skeptical engineer.

agent_findings: Retries are bounded by maxAttempts and stop on non-retryable errors.
The test suite covers timeout retry but not rate-limit retry.
agent_recommendations: Review whether rate-limit responses should be considered retryable.
Add a targeted test only if the team confirms that behavior.
human_review_items: Confirm whether the retry policy matches production expectations.
next_suggested_step: Ask for a level_2_plan_only test plan if the missing rate-limit case matters.
